exercises.title: Create Your First HTML Page
exercises.description: Create a complete HTML document with proper structure including DOCTYPE, html, head, and body elements.
tasks: Add the DOCTYPE declaration at the top
Create the html element with lang="en"
Add head section with charset, viewport, and title
Create body section with a heading and paragraph
Save as index.html and open in browser
exercises.solution:
Hello, World!

This is my first HTML page.

exercises.title: Build a Semantic Layout
exercises.description: Create a web page layout using semantic HTML elements instead of divs.
tasks: Create a header element with an h1 title
Add a nav element with a list of 3 navigation links
Create a main element containing at least 2 sections
Each section should have an h2 heading and content
Add an aside element with sidebar content
exercises.solution:
My Website

  • Home
  • About
  • Contact

Welcome

This is the home section.

About Us

Learn more about our mission.

Related Links

  • Resources
  • Blog

© 2026 My Website. All rights reserved.

exercises.title: Create a Contact Form
exercises.description: Build an accessible contact form with proper labels and input types.
tasks: Create a form element with action attribute
Add a text input for name with label
Add an email input for email with label
Add a textarea for message with label
Ensure all inputs have associated labels
exercises.solution: Contact Us
